citations.quote: The accommodation support service can: Offer advice and information on finding a flat in the private sector
Provide a dedicated member of staff to provide information and to answer any related queries
Provide a landlord reference within 5 working days when you email us at accommodation@napier.ac.uk
Please contact privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk with your enquiries.
ENSA Advice ... can offer ... Advice on how to find accommodation
Please contact ENSA Advice on 0131 229 8791 to arrange an appointment or email ensa.advice@napier.ac.uk

findings.text: The University offers a private accommodation support service providing advice, flat viewing setup, and a dedicated staff contact via privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk.
The service can provide a landlord reference within 5 working days upon email request to accommodation@napier.ac.uk.
ENSA Advice offers free, confidential advice on finding accommodation, reviewing leases, tenant rights, and disputes; contactable at 0131 229 8791 or ensa.advice@napier.ac.uk.
No internal records (emails, casenotes) regarding Anfal's contact with accommodation support are present in the provided source materials. A follow-up task is needed to search internal systems.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Evidence Map: Accommodation Support Contacts

**Source:** NAP-SRC-0014 (Private Accommodation Brochure 2025)

### Key Contacts Identified
- **Private Accommodation Support Service:** privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk
- **General Accommodation Enquiries:** accommodation@napier.ac.uk (landlord reference requests)
- **ENSA Advice:** 0131 229 8791 / ensa.advice@napier.ac.uk

### Services Offered
- Advice on finding private sector flats
- Setting up flat viewings
- Dedicated staff member for queries
- Landlord reference within 5 working days
- ENSA: lease review, tenant rights, dispute help

### Gap
No evidence of Anfal's actual contact with these services. Requires internal records search.
proposed_artifacts.title: Accommodation Support Evidence Map

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search internal email and casenote systems for any records of communication between Anfal and the private accommodation support service (privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk), general accommodation (accommodation@napier.ac.uk), or ENSA Advice (ensa.advice@napier.ac.uk). Look for emails, case notes, or logs referencing Anfal's name, student ID, or accommodation issues. Report any findings with timestamps and summaries.
proposed_tasks.title: Internal records search for Anfal's accommodation support contacts

risk_flags.text: No internal records of Anfal's contact with accommodation support are present in the provided source materials. This gap may affect assessment of whether the University fulfilled its support obligations.

summary: Reviewed NAP-SRC-0014 (Private Accommodation Brochure 2025) to identify accommodation support contacts and services available to students. The brochure lists a dedicated private accommodation support service (privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk), a general accommodation email for landlord references, and ENSA Advice for tenant rights. However, no internal records of Anfal's actual contact with these services were found in the provided source materials. A follow-up task is proposed to search internal email and casenote systems for any communications involving Anfal.

uncertainties.text: It is unknown whether Anfal ever contacted the accommodation support service, as no internal records are present in the provided source materials.
